description: Legal document. In Arabic script. Dated: 8 Jumādā II 907. A (sale?) contract beginning with "qabaḍ al-muʿallim Aḥmad b. Yūsuf" concerning several people, one of whom is Yūsuf b. Manṣūr b. Manṣūr b. al-Yahūdī. The amount mentioned is 15 nisfs, which could probably be a reference to the medins minted in the time of the Ottoman Sultan Suleiman I. Also mentions Levantine cheese (al-jibn al-shāmī). Appears to be complete with witnesses. Needs further examination. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי. בכתב ערבי. תאריך: 8 ג'מאדה ב' 907. חוזה (מכר?) הפותח בקבל אל-מועלים אחמד ב. יוסף בנוגע לכמה אנשים כולל יוסף ב. מנצור ב. מנצור ב. אל-יהודי
